subject: Secure holding area door hardware specification conflict
question: Specification section 08 71 13 calls for electromechanical locks in detention holding area but GSA security design guide requires locking mechanism rated for 1000 lb force. Current spec hardware is rated 600 lb. Please clarify required hardware or issue revised specification.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

subject: Courtroom acoustic wall panel substrate
question: Architectural drawing A-612 shows acoustic panels attached to gypsum substrate in 6 courtrooms but specification section 09 84 00 requires plywood backing. Structural drawings show no plywood in room schedule. Please confirm backing requirement and update structural drawings.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

subject: Emergency generator fuel storage compliance
question: Mechanical drawings show 2000-gallon diesel AST adjacent to building at north side. DC Fire Marshal requires minimum 30-foot setback from building and 50-foot from property line per NFPA 30. Current location does not comply. Please redesign generator fuel storage location.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

subject: LEED credit documentation - low-emitting materials
question: LEED v4 EQ Credit Low-Emitting Materials requires VOC documentation for all adhesives sealants paints and coatings. Project specifications reference older LEED v3 thresholds. Please confirm which version requirements apply and provide updated material requirements list.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

subject: Section 3 workforce tracking integration with certified payroll
question: HUD requires Section 3 worker hours to be reported monthly via HUD-60002. GSA's Davis-Bacon certified payroll system does not have a Section 3 worker designation field. Please clarify the reporting mechanism for workers who qualify as both Davis-Bacon covered and Section 3 new hires.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex
